name: Missing Episodes
description: Scan your Jellyfin library, Sonarr, or TMDB for missing TV episodes and send them to Sonarr.
overview: Finds the gaps in your TV library with three scan sources (Jellyfin virtual items, Sonarr, TMDB) plus a gap-detection fallback, a clean per-show detail view, bulk Sonarr search, an Ignored list, scan history, live progress, and a sidebar entry.

versions.changelog:
First public beta.
- Sonarr / Jellyfin scan sources + Virtual / TMDB / Gap Jellyfin methods.
- Bulk + per-season + per-episode Sonarr search.
- Active / Ignored tabs, All / TV / Anime filter.
- Storage chip, path pill, have/total per-season counts with mini progress bars.
- Persistent results + scan history.
- Background scan with live progress + completion toast.
- Admin sidebar entry.
